items.label: Quick launch behaviour
items.description: What to do when Squire is launched via Quick Launch. If 'start conversation' is selected, Squire will start listening immediately. If 'stay open' is chosen, Squire will quit after a minute of inactivity. If 'open home screen' is chosen, Squire will behave the same as if launched from the app launcher.

items.label: Confirm prompts before responding
items.description: When enabled, after dictating to the watch, you'll always be asked to confirm your input before Squire takes action. When disabled, Squire will respond immediately to whatever was recognised.

items.label: Allow location access
items.description: Squire can use your location to provide contextually relevant information, including local weather and transit as well as more broadly understanding your local context.

items.defaultValue: Sign in to Telegram directly from the watch, or from this page below. Disconnect is available in the app's More menu.

items.label: Agent Bot Username
items.description: Enter the username of your OpenClaw or Hermes bot (e.g., @MyOpenClawBot or @MyHermesBot). OpenClaw and Hermes are both supported.

items.defaultValue: To sign in from this page: enter your phone number and press Save. Telegram will send you a login code; reopen this page, enter the code (and your two-step verification password if you have one), and press Save again. These fields are cleared after each attempt and are never stored.

items.label: Phone Number
items.description: Your Telegram account's phone number, in international format.

items.label: Login Code
items.description: The code Telegram sent you after saving your phone number.

items.label: Two-Step Verification Password
items.description: Only needed if your Telegram account has a cloud password (two-step verification).
